progress.completed_slice: Wire explicit verifier-status and fail-closed acceptance artifacts into the Cloudflare deployment workflow.
progress.verification: Four isolated deterministic Node tests passed. No Cloudflare deployment or GitHub Actions execution was observed for the workflow commit.
progress.acceptance_state: deliberately rejected until cryptographic signature verification is wired

Dispatch the committed workflow and capture its returned Cloudflare Pages URL.
Add a real cryptographic attestation signature and verification step, then replace not_verified only with the verifier's explicit success result.
Verify served research-surface identity and bind the accepted packet to the deployed source commit.
handoff: Frontier Research should evaluate the narrowest supported GitHub/Sigstore attestation signing and verification path for this workflow. Cloudflare Research should not mark evidence accepted until that verifier runs successfully.
